titleStmt.title: SII 22.163: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 163. (A.R. No. 163 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE WALL OF THE SECOND GŌPURA, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE. PAR. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (II)—13th YEAR (A.D. 1158-59)

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumādum etc. It registers a grant of twenty vēli of land separated from out of four hamlets and grouped together as one village under the name Rājarājamaṅgalam and converted into a dēvadāna iṟaiyili from the original ūrkiḻ-iṟaiyili of the component parts, under orders of the king at the request of the Kiḷiyūr Malaiyamān chief Periya-Uḍaiyāṉ Nīrēṟṟāṉ alias Rājarāja-Malaiyakularāyaṉ, for the requirements of worship etc., in the temple of Ūrbagaṅkoṇḍaruḷiṉa-Mahādēva. The king is stated to have been seated in the hall Pallavarāyaṉ-maṇḍapa in his palace at Āyirattaḷi while making this grant. The chief Nīrēṟṟān figures later as donor (in No. 158 above) in the reign of Kulōttunga III.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamā
tum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pu
lka Arumaṟaivitiyi neṟiyaṉaittun=taḻaippa varumu
ṟaiurimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭi tiṅkaḷ veṇku
ṭait tikaikkaḷūṟeṭṭum taṅkutanikkūṭam tāneṉa viḷaṅkak karuṅkalippaṭṭi yaic ceṅkol turappa poruṅkati rāḻippuvi vaḷarntuṭaṉvaravilla
variraṭṭar minavar ciṅkaṇar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇ ṇaruṅ kaṟpakam maṇṇakam puṇarṉtu cempon virasiṅhāsanattu puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu
m viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecari patmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu ḷ 100 8 10 4- nāl Āyirattaḷiyiṟ koyilil Uḷḷā
lai Āṭṭattu veḷiyil pallavarāyaṉ maṇṭapattu Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkak kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ periyauṭaiyāṉ nireṟṟāṉāṉa rājarāja malaiyakularāyaṉ tiruvaṭit
toḻutu viṇṇappañ ceyyat tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷiṉapaṭi malāṭāṉa jaṉaṉāthavaḷanāṭṭup pānūṟkūṟṟattu Iṟaiyānaraiyūrāṉa śrīcoḻakeraḷaccaturve
dimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷina mahādevaṟku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Ivvūrp piṭākai Arumpulipāṭiyiṉum nallaracūriṉum ne
ṭumānūriṉum malaiyanūriṉum nirnilattu Idevar Ūṟkiḻiṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟa nilamuṭpaṭap paḻampeyarum muṉniṟaikaṭṭiṉapaṭiyun=tavirttu yāṇṭu 10 3vatumutal
Iṟaiyiliyāy veṟupiṟin=ta rājarājamaṅkalam nir nilam 2 10 veli-kku yāṇṭu 10 3vatumutal veli 1- kku I 8 10- ḷamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉapaṭi yāṇṭu 100 10vatu mutal deva
[dāna Iṟai] yiliyāy veṟupiṟin=tamaikku Ivai śrīkaraṇanāyakam paḻaiyanū ruṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇanāyakam paṉaiyūruṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
